homeostaticseasons.command.query_next_se: There are %s days (%s ticks) left until %s.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.changeb: Whether or not the birch leaves color changes based on the current season.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.changef: Whether or not the foliage color changes based on the current season.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.changeg: Whether or not the grass color changes based on the current season.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.earlyau: The length of Early Autumn subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.earlysp: The length of Early Spring subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.earlysu: The length of Early Summer subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.earlywi: The length of Early Winter subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.fixedse: The season that is always active when the season change method is set to Fixed.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.hemisph:
The hemisphere in which the seasons progress.
Northern: Spring starts in March.
Southern: Spring starts in September.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.lateaut: The length of Late Autumn subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.latespr: The length of Late Spring subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.latesum: The length of Late Summer subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.latewin: The length of Late Winter subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.midautu: The length of Mid Autumn subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.midspri: The length of Mid Spring subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.midsumm: The length of Mid Summer subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.midwint: The length of Mid Winter subseason in Minecraft days.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.seasona:
Whether or not snow layers placed by seasonal snow replace vegetation such as tall grass and flowers.
Disable this if you want seasonal snow to behave like normal snow.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.seasonc:
The method by which seasons change.
Realtime: Seasons change based on the real-world time.
Fixed: Is always set to the configuration fixed season.
Configured: Seasons change based on the configured term length.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.seasons: All settings related to the seasons system.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.snowacc:
The maximum height of snow layers that can accumulate due to seasonal snow.
This effectively sets the gamerule 'snowAccumulationHeight' for seasonal snow.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.startin:
The season that is active when a world is created.
Only used when the season change method is set to Configured.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.title: Homeostatic Seasons
homeostaticseasons.configuration.visuals: All settings related to visual effects.
homeostaticseasons.configuration.weather: All settings related to weather effects.
